'''tavogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tablemat|tablemat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tablemat|tablemat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tavogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tævegeth|tævegeth]] || [[word:tævegej|tævegej]] || [[word:tævegesh|tævegesh]] || [[word:tævege|tævege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tavovogoth|tavovogoth]] || [[word:tavovogoj|tavovogoj]] || [[word:tavovogosh|tavovogosh]] || [[word:tavovogo|tavovogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tavogoth|tavogoth]] || [[word:tavogoj|tavogoj]] || [[word:tavogosh|tavogosh]] || [[word:tavogo|tavogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tavofgoth|tavofgoth]] || [[word:tavofgoj|tavofgoj]] || [[word:tavofgosh|tavofgosh]] || [[word:tavofgof|tavofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tavogotho|tavogotho]] || [[word:tavogojo|tavogojo]] || [[word:tavogosho|tavogosho]] || [[word:tavogoko|tavogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tavogoth|tavogoth]] || [[word:tavogoj|tavogoj]] || [[word:tavogosh|tavogosh]] || [[word:tavogo|tavogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tavogothol|tavogothol]] || [[word:tavogojol|tavogojol]] || [[word:tavogoshol|tavogoshol]] || [[word:tavogokol|tavogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tavogothotho|tavogothotho]] || [[word:tavogojojo|tavogojojo]] || [[word:tavogoshosho|tavogoshosho]] || [[word:tavogoko|tavogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tavogothon|tavogothon]] || [[word:tavogojon|tavogojon]] || [[word:tavogoshon|tavogoshon]] || [[word:tavogokon|tavogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tavogothoro|tavogothoro]] || [[word:tavogojoro|tavogojoro]] || [[word:tavogoshoro|tavogoshoro]] || [[word:tavogokoro|tavogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
